name: Tom Cotton
subject: Tell Republican Senators: FILL THE SEAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
We have the chance to cement a conservative majority on the Supreme Court. We can re-elect President Trump for four more years to fight for the forgotten American. We can hold the Senate against Chuck Schumer and the liberal mob. And we can kick Pelosi out of power back to San Francisco, where she can violate California’s lockdown order anytime she wants. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

We are at a crossroads. And we are all in this fight together.

The next six weeks may be the most intense political campaign in the past century.

We have the chance to cement a conservative majority on the Supreme Court. We can re-elect President Trump for four more years to fight for the forgotten American. We can hold the Senate against Chuck Schumer and the liberal mob. And we can kick Pelosi out of power back to San Francisco, where she can violate California’s lockdown order anytime she wants.

But to do all of this, we will need the Republican Senate to stand strong against the liberal mob.

That’s where I need your help.

Will you sign my petition to deliver to my Senate Republican colleagues to stand strong against the liberal mob and FILL THE SEAT? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Right now, the liberal mob is harassing Senators, burning down buildings, threatening violence, and trying to intimidate Republicans into backing down.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

The liberal mob wants us to ignore our Constitutional duty and let a future liberal fill the Supreme Court vacancy.

It just takes a few Republican Senators to decide the liberal mob is too much—and then, we won’t have the votes.

We can’t let that happen.

That’s why I need your help: will you join me and send a message to Republican Senators that we need to do our jobs? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

We were elected to fight for conservative values we can’t back down just because the going gets tough.

I know that I’m not backing down. But I want to make sure that other Senators agree.

Please, will you sign my petition to tell the Republicans to stand strong against the liberal mob and FILL THE SEAT? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0

In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MTIwMzcS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTc5ODM4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

name: [QUICK] via Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: They can't win without lying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans like Perdue are lying about pre-existing conditions |
---
Friend, Republicans can't win without lying.

We already knew that Jon Ossoff's opponent, David Perdue, lied about his record on pre-existing conditions. **_His claims certainly don't jibe with his history voting AGAINST pre-existing condition protections._**

And now, we know: Perdue isn't the only GOP Senate candidate lying about their stance on pre-existing conditions.

GOP Senators Cory Gardner, Martha McSally, and Steve Daines have **_ALL_** run ads proclaiming support for protections for pre-existing conditions, despite _**ALL**_ having voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act and weaken those critical protections.

_Just like David Perdue._

This is what the Republican Party stands for.

**[Friend, can you chip in $20 to Jon Ossoff's campaign right now to get one of these lying Senators OUT of office?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5c/5b2c1286/3a5c49f2/25f3e264/3920902475/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist?refcode=em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist&amount=20")**
| | [DONATE $20!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5c/5b2c1286/3a5c49f2/25f3e264/3920902475/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist?refcode=em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist&amount=20")
---

These are all sitting Senators, friend. **They should all be able to campaign on their actual records.**

**But David Perdue and his GOP colleagues know that the truth isn't enough.** Voters don't like what they're doing to this country, and the Senators know they won't get six more years running on a truthful platform. _So Perdue and company have resorted to lies and senseless attack ads._

_It's pathetic._

Georgia -- and the country -- deserve better than this, friend! We deserve leaders who will actually fight for us with honesty and integrity.

**[This is important, friend. The votes these Senators take affect people's lives. Can you chip in any amount right now to help elect new, truthful leadership this November?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5c/5b2c1286/3a5c49f2/25f3e267/3920902475/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist?refcode=em_2020_09_19_nbc_pre_exist")**

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: confirm a Justice NOW
body:
With a vacancy on the Supreme Court, I stand with President Trump in saying: FILL THAT SEAT!
Peter,With a vacancy on the Supreme Court, I stand with President Trump in saying: **FILL THAT SEAT!** Democrats have already promised to PACK THE COURTS if they win in November, so we not only need to confirm a Justice NOW--we MUST keep our Senate Majority. I'm ready to join the fight, but I NEED your help to get to the Senate. [**Can you chip-in before midnight? **](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xotjhk-fuutjhhtj-r/)**DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT - SAVE THE SUPREME COURT** [CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xotjhk-fuutjhhtj-y/) [CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xotjhk-fuutjhhtj-j/) [CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xotjhk-fuutjhhtj-t/) [CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xotjhk-fuutjhhtj-i/) The Democrats want to confirm activist judges and justices to rubber stamp their unconstitutional, far-left agenda. # Join Latinos for Trump in San Antonio TX

Then travel with us along a route in North San Antonio to show our support for our beloved President Trump!

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Join us & U.S. Senator Cory Booker!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**Fellow Democrats,**
** **
**We are excited to announce that U.S. Senator Cory Booker will join us for a very special online event on Thursday, September 24 at 6:30 p.m. to support the West Virginia Democratic Party and our voter turnout efforts across the state. **
** **
**[RSVP today to join us for a conversation with Senator Cory Booker](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19407149/252978507/1799472555?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNhOWM5YS1jYWZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S5XzsELG_EE2GatIOlhFmoWCu0TRuSxjdWGar2Z27WE=)**
** **
**Individual tickets: $50**
**Young Democrats: $25**
**Sponsorships: GOLD $1,000 | Silver $500 | Bronze $250 **
** **
**Contributions from this event will be directed toward outreach efforts to increase turnout among young voters across West Virginia. **
** **
**From job creation, to college affordability, to health care access, young people understand that there is so much at stake in this election, and data shows that voters under the age of 30 are more likely to support Democrats up and down the ballot. By promoting absentee and early voting to young West Virginians, we can increase turnout and help win elections across the state. **** **
**Please join us on September 24 for a conversation with Senator Booker to discuss why this year’s election is important and how we can all work together to deliver change.**
** **
**Sincerely, **
**Team WVDP **

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

subject: “We need Corky” -President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
President Trump knows I’m in his corner. Are you?
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/f30d2f4a9194e465c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, President Trump is taking this race seriously. He means business about ousting career politicians, especially the likes of Jeanne Shaheen. The President knows how nervous the Democrats are of losing their Senate seat, and he’s fighting back hard to help me defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen this November. **They’re growing desperation only makes them more dangerous**. They know that any path to reclaiming the majority in the Senate runs right through New Hampshire. The Dems are desperate to win it back, and they are doing everything they can to prop up Senator Shaheen for her reelection bid. But I know that Granite Staters are sick of politics as usual. I know they are ready for real change, and a principled leader who will fight for their rights in Washington. I’m proud to be endorsed by President Trump, and will fight to defend his America First policies every chance I get. I know that we can Keep America Great, but only if we defeat Jeanne Shaheen in 2020 and flip this seat RED. **Will you please chip in what you can right now to help us fight the Democrat machine in New Hampshire? President Trump knows how important it is, that’s why he’s given me his complete endorsement in this race!** [DONATE $5 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/0d78676c0bb41c0bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $10 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/6edf4fa95f208d12c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $25 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/ea7a0ad456eb59a6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $50 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/c2c0574e5efbde15c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [DONATE $100 NOW! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/94159c02094614c9/e08b2701de02393fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) **[Please chip in today to help support my campaign and support President Trump. name: True the Vote
subject: Get ready to VOTE!
body:
September 22, 2020 is National Voter Registration Day!
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2319)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Get Ready to Vote
Three To Dos for National Voter Registration Day!
---
| | 1\. If you're over 18, a citizen, and not yet registered to vote [get registered!](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2326)
2\. If you are registered, go to the [Secretary of State's website in your state and check your registration](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2326) to make sure it's accurate and active! 3\. And, if you've moved recently, go to the [Secretary of State website of your former state](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2326) and check your registration .... Is it still active? If so, contact their office and take the necessary steps to have your registration removed.
Today is like Election Day prep – make sure you're ready!

True the Vote is here to help with resources not just for getting registered, but also getting ready to vote and have your voice heard. Click below for our state-by-state voter guide.
---
| | [ GET READY TO VOTE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2326)
---
| | With a historic presidential election approaching, every eligible American voter should exercise his or her right to be heard at the ballot box. National Voter Registration Day was founded in 2012 to create an annual moment when the entire nation focuses on registering Americans to exercise their most basic right – the right to vote. Nearly 3 million Americans have registered to vote on this holiday since it began 8 years ago. Yet, with one in four Americans still not registered, our country has more work to do. You can help by making sure you've done your National Voter Registration Day To Dos and spreading the word to others in your community! Use the hashtags #TTV2020 and #VoteReady and be sure to tag us on [Facebook](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2327) and [Twitter](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=245A512A20A2328)!

---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Join the Conversion on Social:

---

Dear Peter,

Today is National Voter Registration Day. On this day, make sure to check that your voter registration is still active, invite a friend to register, and make your plan to VOTE EARLY DURING EARLY VOTING (October 14 - October 29). [http://iwillvote.com]

Then, CHIP IN to join CONGRESSWOMAN AYANNA PRESSLEY for a live-streamed MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE RALLY !

MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE RALLY
with Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley
Thursday, September 24, 2020
7:00 PM CT
Statewide via Zoom

with Special Guests
Andrea Bond Johnson, Candidate TN House 82
Gabby Salinas, Candidate TN House 97
Brandon Thomas, Candidate TN House 49
Glenn Scruggs, Candidate TN Senate 10
Kendra Lee, TNDP Voter Protection Director
Kiran Sreepada, Candidate for US Congress TN-7

Most people are chipping in $25! [https://tndp.org/pressley/]
Anything you donate will be used to ensure that we continue to chip away at the Republican majority in Tennessee.

No one understands the need for this better than Ayanna Pressley. A dogged advocate for women's healthcare and expanding democracy, she'll bring the excitement, the passion, and the energy that we need right now. Chip in for the event now! [https://tndp.org/pressley/]

See you on Thursday,
Mary Mancini

The future of our democracy hangs in the balance.
#

**Are you registered to vote?**
This is the most important election of our lives, and the future of our democracy hangs in the balance.
Today is National Voter Registration Day, so please take a moment to make sure you’re registered to vote on **[IWillVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19415782/253015105/327637188?refcode=em200922-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjI5ZDRmMi1lM2ZjLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WBvY66HSWxcZXgsrF1ot3Tuf-pELMXr7Bg5FNVyfiM=&emci=e264daeb-e3fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ab29d4f2-e3fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=24719896)** and ask three friends to do the same!

| Peter,
For as long as I'm in Congress, I'll defend President Trump from the unhinged attacks coming from the left and will work with him to put AMERICA FIRST. Making this stand has put a target on my back.
I'm taking on the D.C. SWAMP, the FAKE NEWS mainstream media, and the loony socialists in Congress. They are attacking me at every turn, no matter what I'm doing. Truth be told, I've got a lot of "fans" that can't stand all of our winning.
BUT, I can only keep getting critical victories through your contributions. I'm not a regular politician, I don't take corporate PAC money because I want to represent your interests, not theirs. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Answers to Your Questions
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Since taking on Governor Walz from an organizational standpoint, we've been humbled to have tens of thousands of Minnesotans join us in the battle. Many of you have reached out to politicians when we asked. Others have donated to fund our activities to hold these people accountable. We can't thank you enough! Every week, hundreds of supporters reach out directly to me with questions about the battle. Since many of you have the same questions, I would like to address the most common ones we receive. **1\. Why don't we sue Governor Walz?** There are several lawsuits currently in the Minnesota court system. One lawsuit filed in Ramsey County was thrown out by the judge. Other counties are considering the merits of cases involving the business shutdown and mask mandates. We are crossing our fingers that these lawsuits are successful, but take the position that the political route is a much better route than hoping a judge rules in favor of the Constitution. In these days, judges rarely rule against the government in favor of liberty. **2\. How does the ruling against the Pennsylvania governor affect us?** Although rare, the cases in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin are ones that actually ruled in favor of liberty. As you may remember, the Wisconsin Supreme Court ruled against Governor Evers earlier this year. The ruling in Pennsylvania was decided by a federal judge, a Trump appointee. "The Wolf administration’s pandemic policies have been overreaching, arbitrary and violated citizens’ constitutional rights" wrote the judge in his opinion. I know what you are thinking...substitute "Walz" for "Wolf" and the same thing should apply. Unfortunately, that case was specific for the state of Pennsylvania and is in a completely separate federal district than the one Minnesota is in. **3\. What's the status of the Recall Walz effort?** Our team is supporting the great patriots behind the Recall Walz effort. This governor should pay the price for what he did to our economy and liberties. We've found out since taking on this battle that Minnesota recall law is one of the worst in the country and is proving to be a difficult, but not impossible, objective. There have been two recall petitions accepted by the Secretary of State and presented to the MN Supreme Court. Both of those petitions were rejected by the Chief Justice. Every time this happens, it requires the legal team to evaluate the reason behind the rejection, then make adjustments with the next submission. A new petition was submitted this last week which establishes that Walz, in mandating face coverings under EO 20-81, acted contrary to substantive legal precedent. This time, the Court cannot ignore Walz’s brazen misconduct. As this Petition explains, Walz has acted unlawfully by giving himself the power to usurp and suspend three Minnesota statutes. Two statutes are even within the Emergency Management Law. In particular, Walz’s face covering mandate requires Minnesota to violate Minn. Stat. § 609.735, which criminally prohibits face coverings unless, as relevant here, for medical treatment. If Walz argues the face coverings are treatment, then he violates Minn. Stat. § 12.39 prohibiting the governor from mandating treatment. Finally, Walz ignores Minn. Stat. § 12.32, which does not allow the Governor to suspend statutes even during a declared emergency. If we succeed at the Supreme Court level, then we will have to gather voter signatures statewide. We've helped build signers of the Recall effort to prepare for the 90 day period where the law requires us to capture over 600,000 voter signatures. **4\. I don't like donating online, what address can I send a check to?** Our team is transitioning into a new headquarters and is no longer located in the Woodbury office. The new A4L headquarters will be the future home of our training events and has a state of art studio being built for podcasts and other media. Please send to:
### Action 4 Liberty
### 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
### Roseville, MN 55113
Thanks for your support and questions. We do our best to read all emails and messages that come in. Please help us grow by donating to the largest grassroots conservative organization in Minnesota. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=3)
---
Action 4 Liberty will not rest until we End Walz' Emergency Powers and make him pay for what he did to Minnesota!
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=answers_to_questions&n=6), software for leaders.

#
I just got off the phone with my Finance Director, and she shared some exciting news: **we are only 168 donors away from our end of quarter goal of 4,000 donors. **

Last week, we received a LOT of individual donations, which gave us a big boost in getting so close to this goal. We hope to keep this momentum going through the end of the quarter and all the way to Election Day. But we can only do that with your support.

Reaching this number would show to everyone that this grassroots campaign is serious, and ready to unseat Adam Kinzinger in the Fall. 4,000 donors is an astronomical amount, and we are so, so close to reaching it.

[Let’s do this.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=54c244d823&e=140a9b81e7)

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Lisa Scheller endorsed by David Christine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER ENDORSED BY DAVID CHRISTINE

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

ALLENTOWN, PA - Allentown businesswoman and Republican nominee for Congress in
Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District, Lisa Scheller announced today that
she earned the endorsement of David Christine, the Monroe County District
Attorney. This marks the second District Attorney in the 7th congressional
district to endorse Lisa Scheller’s bid for congress. Following Lehigh District
Attorney Jim Martin’s endorsement.

David Christie had this to say about his endorsement of Lisa Scheller:

“As a prosecutor and a Republican for over two decades, I've known Lisa
Scheller to be a strong leader and a voice for the common people. Her time as
Lehigh County Commissioner and in running her business makes her the perfect
person to represent the 7th Congressional District. There is no one better
suited to stand up for those who live here than Lisa Scheller. She is the best
candidate to put the people's safety first, regardless of politics. She has the
integrity and executive experience we need in Congress. Lisa is going to fight
to ensure that your voice is always heard. She is truly a voice for the folks
here and has vowed to end the dysfunction in Washington.”

David Christine began his sixth, four-year term as the elected District
Attorney of Monroe County, Pennsylvania. Having begun his 20th year in office
this past January, Mr. Christine is now the longest-serving District Attorney
in the history of Monroe County.

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Registered to vote? It’s National Voter Registration Day!
body:
| | Peter, Did you know there are 15 million Christians in the United States who are not registered to vote? Are you one of them? If so, don’t worry! We’ve got you covered. Register to vote [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Lywr6AvH6rr-WqnoIVZ1slPq1IAPSi6L9MmvfstRW8WQKFtKwGrMDUz5kbn8G4kgSV7gh3R1xbqWJht5PfFnTRoHzupy9NAdTDbb7rz2tCiHQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200922com01&n=1) **before the October 13 registration deadline in Virginia.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Lywr6AvH6rr-WqnoIVZ1slPq1IAPSi6L9MmvfstRW8WQKFtKwGrMDUz5kbn8G4kgSV7gh3R1xbqWJht5PfFnTRoHzupy9NAdTDbb7rz2tCiHQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200922com01&n=2) If you’re already registered to vote, please take a minute to make sure your friends, family, and church community are registered so that they can cast their vote on November 3. **Remember, early voting in Virginia is September 18 - October 31.** Christian voices are needed now more than ever before to stand for the sanctity of life, marriage and family, and religious freedom in the public square. **Biblical values are worth voting for on November 3. It’s up to people of faith to stand for our Judeo-Christian values at the polls.** Please forward this email to others and help Christians vote! **Pary. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200922com01&n=3) **P.S.** Visit the [**Voting Assistance Center**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91AcWR37Aq_zM-Pb8UXzJ18RDXQnLcn6XY3v7CgASEi0A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200922com01&n=4) for more information on absentee ballots or mail-in ballots for your state.
---

subject: We need to ramp up, starting now!

body:
It's crunch time. |
---
Friend,

This week, some Georgians will begin casting their ballots. _It's crunch time, and we still have a lot more to do._

**We have plans to massively ramp up our advertising and organizing efforts, starting this week through November 3, but we need your help to do so.**

**[Can you rush a donation right now so we can increase our ad spending and scale up our organizing efforts?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5d/5b2c1286/3a44a819/25f3e082/3980923248/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_ramp_up?refcode=em_2020_09_21_ramp_up")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [EXPRESS DONATE: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5d/5b2c1286/3a44a819/25f3e085/3980923248/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_ramp_up?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_21_ramp_up_ex_10")
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE: $20](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5d/5b2c1286/3a44a819/25f3e084/3980923248/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_ramp_up?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_2020_09_21_ramp_up_ex_20")

| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5d/5b2c1286/3a44a819/25f3e087/3980923248/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_ramp_up?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_21_ramp_up_ex_other")
---

This is the most important time in an election cycle, and we can't afford to leave anything on the field.

We need your help TODAY so we can reach every single voter in Georgia before they cast their ballots -- **_and as we've said before, many voters are going to be casting their ballots _THIS WEEK_!!!_**

**If our fundraising momentum slows, we're going to have to let up on advertising and organizing --_and at this point in the game, we just cannot afford to do that._**

**[So please, chip in whatever you can to help us keep these vital programs running.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f5d/5b2c1286/3a44a819/25f3e082/3980923248/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_21_ramp_up?refcode=em_2020_09_21_ramp_up")**

name: MJ for Texas
subject: It's National Voter Registration Day (help us register Texans >>)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
There are millions of unregistered voters in Texas. We need to reach them.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa6295/2922585219/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa6294/2922585219/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nvrd?refcode=email_20200922.1nd__2164__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

The polls have MJ within single digits of Sen. John Cornyn, but to take the lead, we need to register many more Texan voters.

**Luckily, today is National Voter Registration Day.[In honor of this holiday, will you make a DOUBLE MATCHED donation toward our voter registration efforts? ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa6294/2922585219/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nvrd?refcode=email_20200922.1nd__2164__&amount=10")**

There are millions of unregistered voters across Texas, and registering and turning them out for this election will be _the key to victory or defeat._

**Sen. John Cornyn has failed the first duty of his office: putting Texans first. We can 't hand him another six years.**

But if we can register as many Texans as possible between now and the election, we can retire Sen. Cornyn. That task starts now, on National Voter Registration Day.

[**Contribute today. Your donation = double matched.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa6294/2922585219/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nvrd?refcode=email_20200922.1nd__2164__&amount=10")

Y'all, we're in the home stretch now. Let's finish strong.
Thank you,
Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa6294/2922585219/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nvrd?refcode=email_20200922.1nd__2164__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa628b/2922585219/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2164&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f3f/7f51f7bc/458cd100/4efa628a/2922585219/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

name: Alistair Glover
subject: can you help us get out the vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426022/253060969/-940294256?refcode=092220-es-gotv-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=&emci=acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

Vote by Mail ballots go out this week! Our campaign is gearing up to Get Out the Vote and we need you more than ever. I know we can count on you, because we continue to see an outpouring of support from folks on the Suncoast, across Florida, and our nation working to power our grassroots campaign. Thank you for all you have done and all you are going to do over the next six weeks!

**That is why I’m reaching out right now -- to invite you to be a part of this groundbreaking campaign and volunteer your time to help us Get Out The Vote in the most competitive Congressional race in Florida.**

**Not only can you help us flip this seat from red to blue, you can help turn out the voters that Joe Biden needs to win Florida and the White House.**

**[There’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. Click here to sign up to help us Get Out The Vote in this critical election!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426023/253060970/-1805212762?refcode=092220-es-gotv-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=&emci=acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)**

One of the most valuable gifts you can give is your time, and we would be incredibly grateful if you would volunteer to help virtually get out the vote -- from the safety of your own home.

**Together, we can beat back the corporate PAC-funded attacks coming our way and show them that a people-powered campaign can win and flip this district from red to blue.**

**[Please, make time on your calendar and sign up today to help us Get Out The Vote. This election is too important not to.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426024/253060971/-1805212762?refcode=092220-es-gotv-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=&emci=acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)**

Let’s work over the next month and a half to flip this seat and help Margaret deliver big, bold change for Florida and our nation.

Thank you in advance for your time!

Alistair Glover
Field Director
Margaret Good for Congress

**P.S.** If you can’t volunteer, you can still help our campaign by making a donation to help fund our voter outreach efforts! **[Click here to contribute what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426026/253060973/1073285021?refcode2=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=092220-es-gotv-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=)**

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426028/253060975/1073285021?refcode2=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=092220-es-gotv-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19426029/253060976/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=)**

If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to **[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/acf189c3-ddfc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc/ef8ff181-01fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhmZjE4MS0wMWZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rJVT8BF229OBoER13puuUVH5EcAaEwrN2uftHcRzEzE=&id=113801977)**.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: [RSVP] join our virtual event!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I’m excited to announce that I’ll be joining Speaker Nancy Pelosi in a virtual event to support our friend, Amy Kennedy who is running for Congress in New Jersey’s 2nd Congressional District on Thursday, September 24th at 7:15pm ET/ 4:15pm PT.

Amy is on the competitive DCCC Red to Blue list and if elected will help secure and expand our Democratic majority in the house.

If you’re interested in helping us flip New Jersey’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue, please join us on Thursday to learn more about Amy and why she’s the best candidate for the job!
| **Event Details**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Donald Trump was right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Donald Trump was right yesterday when he said Cory Gardner is "very loyal to the party" because Gardner just announced he'll support Trump's likely radical far-right nominee to replace Ruth Bader Ginsburg -- breaking his own commitment from 2016.
I'm not surprised. This is who Cory Gardner is -- too weak to stand up to Trump and McConnell. Too scared to defend justice and equality or do what's right. He's proven that time and again.
In just over two weeks, the people of Colorado will begin voting. We must defeat Gardner. We must end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority. We must beat Trump and take back our country.
**The stakes have never been higher because Democrats cannot take back the Senate and end Mitch McConnell 's grip on power without winning this race. I'm not surprised. This is who Cory Gardner is -- too weak to stand up to Trump and McConnell. Too scared to defend justice and equality or do what's right. He's proven that time and again. In just over two weeks, the people of Colorado will begin voting. We must defeat Gardner. We must end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority. We must beat Trump and take back our country. name: Sri, me (2)
subject: you NEED to see this, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope you saw the news our rapid-response team rushed over to you yesterday.

Joe Biden is only two points behind Donald Trump in Texas -- which means we have a real shot at flipping Texas blue and making history.

If Texas goes blue at the top of the ticket, we will have the White House and the Senate. After this past week, this has never felt more important.

But we know that this year, Texas and Joe Biden will be carried by congressional races like this one.

That’s why I’m asking you to read our team’s message below, and why I’m asking you to donate now to our campaign. The future of our country rests on our shoulders, and we need you in this fight for Texas families.

Your donation puts us one step closer to retaking the White House, Senate, protecting our House Majority, and ensuring a far-right extremist doesn’t represent us in TX-22.

>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.22_b1_sm2_all&amount=25 <<

Thank you,

Sri

---

On September 21, 2020, at 3:31 PM, Team Sri wrote:

---

Hi Friend,

Yesterday a new statewide poll showed that Joe Biden is hot on Donald Trump’s heels in Texas -- in a head to head match-up -- Biden trails by only 2 points!

But here’s the thing, friend: In order for Joe Biden to win Texas, Sri MUST win TX-22. And right now Sri is TIED with his opponent.

DONATE TO HELP US WIN >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.22_b1_sm2_all&amount=25

It’s all hands on deck, friend. The consequences of November’s election couldn’t be more dire.

If Democrats are not able to successfully keep the House Majority and win the White House, we’ll be facing painful repercussions that will last for generations.

If we lose: In a matter of months we could see the repealing of the Affordable Care Act, the overturning of Roe v. Wade, the dismantling of Medicare, and the privatization of Social Security.

We’re not exaggerating, friend. This is the America we face if Donald Trump and House Republicans win big on November 3rd.
But if Texas flips blue, the math is clear: Joe Biden will win the Presidency.

So we have to start local, friend, and that means electing Sri Kulkarni to Congress here in TX-22, where he faces his own Donald Trump-like opponent.

Can you chip in just $22 to help us stay on track in these final 43 days?

>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.22_b1_sm2_all&amount=22 <<

Thank you for stepping up. We need you.
-- Team Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re less than 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.22_b1_sm2_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.22_b1_sm2_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1581f8a3-f7fc-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc/381e2636-07fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFlMjYzNi0wN2ZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EapEwx-qx6KjzeKoMZQOoA903QooNsrPgnNMAeFe1Ks=&id=117373579 .

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is crunch time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Voters start voting in 24 days -- here's how to make every day count.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k) Friend, Today marks 42 days until November 3rd -- but in Washington state, there are only 24 days until voters start voting. We all might have felt like we lived several lifetimes during this election cycle, but it's really, truly, finally coming to an end. This is crunch time because we have only 42 days left to make our case to Washington voters -- and much less for voters who get their ballots in early. This is when every dollar makes a difference, so I have a question: **Will you become a weekly recurring donor through November 3rd?[Commit to just $5 or more a week between now and the end of this election, and know that every grassroots dollar you invest goes into fighting for the progressive values we deserve.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11607?t=4&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11608?t=5&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11609?t=6&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11610?t=7&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11611?t=8&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11612?t=9&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11607?t=10&akid=8158%2E868730%2EVB7g5k)
---
If you're waiting for the right time, that time is now. Let's leave it all on the field and go win this thing.

clean_body: Voters start voting in 24 days -- here's how to make every day count. | Friend, Today marks 42 days until November 3rd -- but in Washington state, there are only 24 days until voters start voting. We all might have felt like we lived several lifetimes during this election cycle, but it's really, truly, finally coming to an end. This is crunch time because we have only 42 days left to make our case to Washington voters -- and much less for voters who get their ballots in early. This is when every dollar makes a difference, so I have a question: Will you become a weekly recurring donor through November 3rd? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | If you're waiting for the right time, that time is now. Let's leave it all on the field and go win this thing. Very truly yours, Jay

body:
political corruption is killing every aspect of life in Illinois, and it will only get worse if we don’t root it out at the ballot box | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ed9150c3b9d847859caf953ab5f4ff77&_e=rucynw1WVS6su0l0toFAkuy5R8y5Wn6NhYvmYvl11Eu6LB6XEkncEHIcTzPgTcVqzO6S3tsynfKg4KlTc7CRbrevJvFkbQWItl0-priMmAo0ab0ijK2Pv4GN9tGczBHwIvKlwxzjJ94O7pF8uVodRBct2mxQx97qv1w713SPLrKqmBJw-fxAP6xPuVBRSmKjVt8Wsaq5bM2-_Y93vtxjiaTBRKjUEFDfq1zi7HwrgfYppdnvL4UWcvNMuFT3IThX16q0uu3BmsyhIjnKpYEUCCOU6oRR9ukzTz-HfrMlgqTI9M0zKG006iUculRvswfjGaqk8jzR5D3k5X5i7plXgBDIsnaOh29ghKxwclMOyjNAJQLju56K96_o7qnKqTt6k86O8K2ON-I-S9A-DpCA2WR8w5v4hchKOgxy-97gNPNZvZbaVMsxmy0ueCZ-jmq5E65d73ya7BmlYIoZ2WohylnhYVgYecxf6nBj8w9pEf8%3D)
|
---
Friend,

The University of Illinois at Chicago just released a study on political corruption that exposes just how crooked our state leaders are – and it’s one that every Illinois voter should see before heading to the polls this November.

Chicago is officially the #1 most corrupt city in the nation, Illinois is the #2 most corrupt state, and it’s costing taxpayers here over **$556 million** every year.

_**Friend, this is why local and state elections matter.**_

Businesses don’t want to invest in corrupt places.

People don’t want to move to raise families in corrupt places.

Tax dollars are spent on bribes and shady deals instead of roads and bridges in corrupt places.

**To put it bluntly: Corruption is killing Illinois, and it will only get worse the longer we allow it to continue.**
[**CHIP IN TO RESTORE PRINCIPLED, CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ed9150c3b9d847859caf953ab5f4ff77&_e=rucynw1WVS6su0l0toFAkuy5R8y5Wn6NhYvmYvl11Eu6LB6XEkncEHIcTzPgTcVqzO6S3tsynfKg4KlTc7CRbrevJvFkbQWItl0-priMmAo0ab0ijK2Pv4GN9tGczBHwIvKlwxzjJ94O7pF8uVodRBct2mxQx97qv1w713SPLrKqmBJw-fxAP6xPuVBRSmKjVt8Wsaq5bM2-_Y93vtxjiaTBRKjUEFDfq1zi7HwrgfYppdnvL4UWcvNMuFT3IThX16q0uu3BmsyhIjnKpYEUCMnRJWhTto9JUwlCkqbS5XeIkvWr0FYvISIX9od2OfUXq2UAnMehJH8_DLFf6v7ogbVoUgXRF0WTI-fRC5aSUhT_GeNEvRJXIDMdhY_Dz0NvBu-L0hITK4QiMutoKbq6k72hTt785qDrsnm0ko8euyFpdSKn7MJE71DWOd-uf7udZiKrqK8PLX__AmOGR8kcV0YBxXLzfocvsEillx7tr70%3D)
All too often we hear corrupt politicians like J.B. Pritzker and Mike Madigan claiming that they should be trusted to root out corruption – despite the fact they’re the ones causing it.

It’s time for a revival of conservative leadership in the Land of Lincoln. Our state has been hollowed out by self-serving criminals for decades, and there are a number of candidates on the ballot this year who have what it takes to turn things around.

_**Can I count on you to join me in the fight to right the ship and restore honest leadership in Illinois?**_
[**CHIP IN TO RESTORE PRINCIPLED, CONSERVATIVE LEADERSHIP**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ed9150c3b9d847859caf953ab5f4ff77&_e=rucynw1WVS6su0l0toFAkuy5R8y5Wn6NhYvmYvl11Eu6LB6XEkncEHIcTzPgTcVqzO6S3tsynfKg4KlTc7CRbrevJvFkbQWItl0-priMmAo0ab0ijK2Pv4GN9tGczBHwIvKlwxzjJ94O7pF8uVodRBct2mxQx97qv1w713SPLrKqmBJw-fxAP6xPuVBRSmKjVt8Wsaq5bM2-_Y93vtxjiaTBRKjUEFDfq1zi7HwrgfYppdnvL4UWcvNMuFT3IThX16q0uu3BmsyhIjnKpYEUCKj50giHREOiqHuVcdOaGYKPsfQulDsuojx7rklj1JcfPwKKoiu_-DSbwH83UASSOW_mUU7GqIoX3SQgflSFEYvRSUuggYlMuyJNfu1JRiVaOUc2LBKU_kaqT2Erop6optmIBdJev0DGUfdgmz6JFcu7ozdg2baC-SyB8vAsW82d9hkznbI1f-_Y8tfOJMsivIov_psjnM8STNzXoJrRCm0%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

If we don’t have someone pushing back on AOC in her own backyard, socialist Democrats will continue to push their dangerous agenda:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: The hypocrisy has to stop 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
The stakes of our election just got higher. With only six weeks until November 3rd, we need all hands on deck. |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9d902122f7&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Hey Team , **The stakes of our election just got higher. With only six weeks until November 3rd, we need all hands on deck. ** | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=adf4adc343&e=e25784ff28)
---

We’re seeing firsthand the hypocrisy of the Republican party. Mitch McConnell, Lindsey Graham, and the rest are planning to push through a Supreme Court nomination just WEEKS before an election. And of course, my opponent Barry Loudermilk is fully supportive of this 100% reversal of their own words and actions when Obama nominated a Supreme Court justice almost a YEAR before the 2016 election.

We need to show the GOP that their disregard for morals and ethics will not stand. It’s not enough to focus on the White House. We need to get rid of all of these hypocrites and enablers by taking MORE seats in the House and flipping the Senate.

[**Can I count on you to make a weekly contribution to my campaign in our home stretch before the election? **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=822a9a2708&e=e25784ff28)

Barry Loudermilk and his pals don’t care about you, and they don’t care about what’s best for this country. They're thinking about what’s best for themselves, and the special interests they serve.

As a representative, Loudermilk should be speaking up and telling leaders of _his_ party that rushing a Supreme Court nomination will hurt the country for years to come. But has he spoken up? No. He’s happy to sit and wait for instruction like the Trump lapdog he is.

[**We need leaders in this district who are not afraid to speak up for what is right and what is ethical. Donate now. **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d5a5345fae&e=e25784ff28)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The stakes of our election just got higher. With only six weeks until November 3rd, we need all hands on deck. | | | | | Hey Team , The stakes of our election just got higher. With only six weeks until November 3rd, we need all hands on deck. | We’re seeing firsthand the hypocrisy of the Republican party. Mitch McConnell, Lindsey Graham, and the rest are planning to push through a Supreme Court nomination just WEEKS before an election. And of course, my opponent Barry Loudermilk is fully supportive of this 100% reversal of their own words and actions when Obama nominated a Supreme Court justice almost a YEAR before the 2016 election. We need to show the GOP that their disregard for morals and ethics will not stand. It’s not enough to focus on the White House. We need to get rid of all of these hypocrites and enablers by taking MORE seats in the House and flipping the Senate. Barry Loudermilk and his pals don’t care about you, and they don’t care about what’s best for this country. They're thinking about what’s best for themselves, and the special interests they serve. As a representative, Loudermilk should be speaking up and telling leaders of his party that rushing a Supreme Court nomination will hurt the country for years to come. But has he spoken up? No. He’s happy to sit and wait for instruction like the Trump lapdog he is. subject: The Senate needs to do its job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Jeanne Shaheen said it herself in 2016 —“The American people expect us to do our jobs.” Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/06373e3c10026d2a/6e9fe98b2d7efcafc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, As if the stakes weren’t high enough for this election, the vacancy on the Supreme Court has taken things to a new level — and we need your help more than ever before. <\- DONATE LINK

We’re exactly SIX WEEKS away from Election Day. President Trump is nominating a Supreme Court justice on SATURDAY, and Mitch McConnell will bring it to a Senate vote.

Here’s why we need your help NOW: Jeanne Shaheen and the Democrats are doing whatever it takes to stop this.

**Just a few days ago, Democrats raised $42 MILLION in one day alone! And that’s to say nothing of the MILLIONS more that Shaheen already has to spend attacking Corky**.

This seat could decide whether or not we KEEP the Senate majority, and Corky can’t win without your immediate help.

**[Will you please rush a donation of $250, $50, or even just $5 RIGHT NOW?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/06373e3c10026d2a/e197144a4e685fa6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/06373e3c10026d2a/33d156d97f6aa18ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Jeanne Shaheen has done nothing but enable liberal policies for decades. Now she’s drifted even further to the left. We must defeat her — but Corky can’t do it without YOU.

The future of New Hampshire, the U.S. Senate, the Supreme Court, and our entire Constitution depends on your swift response.

For truth and justice, Todd Cheewing

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Justice Dept. Brands NYC an ‘Anarchist Jurisdiction,’ Targets Federal Funds
body:
When state and local leaders impede their own law enforcement officers and agencies from doing their jobs, it endangers innocent citizens | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c6abbfbb6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Justice Dept. Brands NYC an ‘Anarchist Jurisdiction,’ Targets Federal Funds**

“New York City was among three cities labeled ‘anarchist jurisdictions’ by the Justice Department on Sunday and targeted to lose federal money for failing to control protesters and defunding cops,” Steven Nelson reports for the _New York Post_.

“When state and local leaders impede their own law enforcement officers and agencies from doing their jobs, it endangers innocent citizens who deserve to be protected, including those who are trying to peacefully assemble and protest,” Attorney General William Barr said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58dbd4e6a1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Less than a year after presiding over an impeachment of President Donald Trump without alleging any violations of law, Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi appears open to trying again. The first time around, Mr. Trump was vindicated by a February acquittal in the Senate. This time, the goal would not be to drive him from office but simply to prevent or at least delay the appropriate functioning of government,” James Freeman writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13c9428079&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As the daughter of a Cuban immigrant, I am eternally grateful for living and having the opportunity to raise my children in America but recognize that our freedoms are fragile and should always be protected. I learned that lesson at a young age when my father, Jose, lost his freedoms because he stood and fought against the Cuban dictatorship,” Mercedes Schlapp writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e794106c59&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Public schools across the country have endorsed the Black Lives Matter movement and encouraged teachers, students and parents to do the same, with some schools organizing their own BLM protests . . . The Black Lives Matter movement has been linked to 91% of riots across the United States between May 24 and Sept. 12,” Peter Hasson writes for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b552dff65b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7b4881ccb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7097b9a0a3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c5cfa3780e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: We must protect the integrity of the Supreme Court ⚖
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Jackie's Walorski’s blatant hypocrisy is disgraceful. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e4b8f99419&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

This weekend we honored the life and legacy of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Less than a day after she passed, Jackie Walorski called on President Trump to nominate a new justice “without delay.”

[Jackie Walorski dishonors Justice Ginsburg.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=16c1385ab8&e=5886ca081d) In her last days, Justice Ginsburg said, "My most fervent wish is that I will not be replaced until a new president is installed." Jackie Walorski wasted no time completely disregarding Justice Ginsburg's dying request and dishonoring her legacy by calling for a quick replacement.

**[Jackie's Walorski’s blatant hypocrisy is disgraceful.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2629cda154&e=5886ca081d) **In 2016, Republicans refused to even consider President Obama's nomination of Judge Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court when there was a vacancy 10 months before the election, saying that a new justice should not be appointed until after the election. Yet only 44 days until November 3, Jackie Walorski is calling for a new justice to be rushed through the confirmation process. Her duplicity is shameful.

[Jackie Walorski is damaging our nation and the integrity of the Supreme Court.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4534cea3fe&e=5886ca081d) Jackie Walorski is attempting to subvert our democracy by ramrodding a nominee, who will have lifetime tenure on our nation's highest court, through the confirmation process. This cheapens the ideal of justice in our country, is an affront to a representative democracy, and actively damages our nation's faith in one of our most hallowed institutions.

[**Jackie Walorski does not stand for justice. We must protect the integrity of the Supreme Court. **](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3cc8b33770&e=5886ca081d)
---

---

Together we will carry forward Justice Ginsburg's fierce devotion to justice. Much will be required of us in the days to come. Let's get to work.

Team Hackett

name: Team Warner
subject: Join Mark Warner for a conversation on gun violence prevention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

The level of gun violence in America is not something we see in other developed nations. While Mark Warner supports safe and responsible gun-ownership, he believes that Democrats and Republicans must come together to take specific measures to address gun violence in our country.

On **Thursday, September 24** , Senator Mark Warner will hold a virtual town hall event to discuss gun violence prevention methods that would save lives in the Commonwealth and around the country. All are welcome to join -- here are the details:
| **A Conversation on Gun Violence Prevention with Senator Mark Warner**
Thursday, September 24, 2020
4:30pm - 5:15pm
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dab1/53d9897e/5598cfe3/1c8812dd/1455170076/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/330048/")**
---

Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark Warner, you can respond directly to this email, or ask in the comment section during the event.

We hope you'll join us! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dab1/53d9897e/5598cfe3/1c8812dd/1455170076/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/330048/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: Gerald Griggs, Civil Rights Attorney
subject: Friend, we almost lost another black life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
georgiablueproject.com [georgiablueproject.com]

Friend,

Roderick Walker was just an innocent man getting a ride with his girlfriend. What should have been a routine rideshare experience almost turned deadly, and what for? Sadly, we all know the answer to this question. Even though he wasn’t even driving the vehicle that was pulled over, Roderick almost became another case study in the discrimination and brutalization of black men at the hands of police.

Now we know that Deputy Brandon Myers, the officer responsible for brutally beating Roderick, had several prior use-of-force complaints against him that the Clayton County Sheriff’s Office initially tried to hide from the public.

Friend, we need effective police reform in Georgia NOW.

But similar to the federal levels of government, our state legislature’s Republicans are either blocking or watering down any attempts at meaningful, healthy change to how our police departments operate.

Friend, Georgia Blue Project is dedicated to flipping the state legislature, local sheriffs’ offices, and county board of commissioners seats because those are the people who make the real choices in Georgia when it comes to police reform. Can you help us reach voters and flip Georgia blue by donating today to this initiative? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-black-lives?refcode=92220]

We cannot continue this slow, bureaucratic process toward real change. We need to elect leaders that understand the urgency of the situation and will meet the moment before them. Georgia is the political epicenter of the country. The time has come to flip it blue.

In Solidarity,
Gerald Griggs
GeorgiaBlueProject.com

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-black-lives?refcode=92220]

name: Dr. Hiral Tipirneni
subject: We need your help in TWO of Arizona’s closest races

name: Team Warren
subject: National Voter Registration Day (important link inside)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If you've been waiting for the perfect time to register to vote, that moment has arrived on a silver platter with a big bow on top. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a3/45c30650/1c00ec071/66e8fc8b/2442147355/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It has never been more important to make our voices heard.

And voting is one of the most powerful tools we have to do exactly that.

**Today is National Voter Registration Day. Depending on where you live, your deadline to register could be right around the corner.

If you've been waiting for the perfect time to register to vote, that moment has arrived on a silver platter with a big bow on top.**

**[Go to IWillVote.com and find out how to sign up in your state. Even if you think you're already registered at your current address, it never hurts to double- or triple-check. You can also learn more about options for voting early or by mail.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a3/45c30650/1c00ec071/66e8fc8a/2442147355/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://iwillvote.com/")**

Next, be a good example by sharing **[IWillVote.com](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a3/45c30650/1c00ec071/66e8fc8a/2442147355/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://iwillvote.com/")** on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, the local neighborhood listserv, the group text, and/or anywhere you have access to. Write it on your forehead. Write it on your mask. Shout it from your nearest mountaintop.

Everything is on the line this November -- lives, livelihoods, health care, climate action, even our very democracy.

The wealthy and well-connected know that they can only keep their corrupt grip on our government if we don't all show up at the ballot box. But this year, we're getting organized and making our voices heard like never before -- because it's never been more critical. Make sure that you're ready to be a part of it.

**[Register to vote at IWillVote.com, and celebrate National Voter Registration Day by spreading the word as widely as possible.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251a3/45c30650/1c00ec071/66e8fc8a/2442147355/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://iwillvote.com/")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

| **If you're able to, please make a donation of $2 or whatever you can to support our grassroots organizing and help elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot.**

And voting is one of the most powerful tools we have to do exactly that. Today is National Voter Registration Day. Depending on where you live, your deadline to register could be right around the corner. If you've been waiting for the perfect time to register to vote, that moment has arrived on a silver platter with a big bow on top. "" Next, be a good example by sharing "" on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, the local neighborhood listserv, the group text, and/or anywhere you have access to. Write it on your forehead. Write it on your mask. Shout it from your nearest mountaintop. Everything is on the line this November -- lives, livelihoods, health care, climate action, even our very democracy. The wealthy and well-connected know that they can only keep their corrupt grip on our government if we don't all show up at the ballot box. But this year, we're getting organized and making our voices heard like never before -- because it's never been more critical. Make sure that you're ready to be a part of it. name: Rick Scott
subject: Why I’m Supporting Kat Cammack
body:
A rising star fighting for North Central Florida...
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c-5PEnjPWFhh51g6E-8fTNCLnb-2b313udbjQEZdvdNxtl_l2SVYzjEAz_eZST9d1o3ppswvfUHQFaXSCzM519dtLI0w90QpGIxzJCu9VB43CtaEIFgAQ3NCOPWNRrlaXxjuL0I1duvdOn_XYSuLU2sYN1rJY5vFeYz9TFvglmKgcEjm79RF4p1MNKpn4Mb5&c=-gC5Pk01_UniJ-v2xj-mnb-G-8kp8N-_3HXNBT9R6z6CnjXHEINBGw==&ch=xDWP6KA4OgnaivfNlQBz5fsJEAYl9U356hWu3FVEWiV69TR_hhmKOQ==)
---
| Patriot,
Let me tell you about my friend, a rising star fighting for North Central Florida, Kat Cammack.
Kat is running to succeed Congressman Ted Yoho in Florida's heartland. Kat, the longtime former Deputy Chief of Staff and Campaign Manager to Congressman Ted Yoho, knows what it takes to get the job done and the importance of protecting our American Dream.
Endorsed by President Trump, Kat is fighting to keep Florida on the right side of history, and we need to deliver big in Florida if we have any chance at maintaining Republican control in November.
Personally, I'm supporting Kat's campaign because she's a fighter.
Kat grew up on a small cattle ranch and learned at an early age what hard work looks like. And then, because of President Obama's failed policies, her family lost their ranch and was forced into homelessness. Instead of giving up and letting those hard times define her, Kat fought back and is now a small business owner and United States Naval War College alumn.
During times of such uncertainty, we need to elect strong conservative fighters like her to Congress so Florida's families can afford to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.
[Will you join me in donating to her campaign today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c-5PEnjPWFhh51g6E-8fTNCLnb-2b313udbjQEZdvdNxtl_l2SVYzjEAz_eZST9d1o3ppswvfUHQFaXSCzM519dtLI0w90QpGIxzJCu9VB43CtaEIFgAQ3NCOPWNRrlaXxjuL0I1duvdOn_XYSuLU2sYN1rJY5vFeYz9TFvglmKgcEjm79RF4p1MNKpn4Mb5&c=-gC5Pk01_UniJ-v2xj-mnb-G-8kp8N-_3HXNBT9R6z6CnjXHEINBGw==&ch=xDWP6KA4OgnaivfNlQBz5fsJEAYl9U356hWu3FVEWiV69TR_hhmKOQ==)

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Re: A Supreme Court Nomination
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Before she passed, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg said it was her "most fervent wish" the she would not be replaced until a new president is installed. Less than 24 hours after her death, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump were making plans to nominate a new Supreme Court Justice.

When Justice Antonin Scalia died in February, 2016, Mitch McConnell refused to hold a vote on President Barack Obama's nominee because it was an "election year." With less than 50 days until Election Day, Mitch McConnell's hypocrisy knows no bounds.

We, the American people, cannot be ignored. We must do everything in our power to stop Senate Majority Leader McConnell from moving forward with a vote.

Will you join me in demanding the Senate wait to vote on the next Supreme Court Justice until after the American people have made their voices heard on November 3rd?

Thanks for taking action,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Bill Olson
subject: The libs are triggered
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am a Trump supporter and a patriot! I will not let the Left destroy this country over their own inability to live peaceably alongside conservatives!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

The passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has thrown the Left into hysterics. These people, who have been burning down cities and assaulting or murdering anyone who disagreed with them, now are threatening the integrity of our Republic if Biden doesn't win and they don't get to choose RBG's replacement.

These people are too much! If this doesn't get every Republican out and voting, I don't know what will:

A leading Democrat in the U.S. Senate came out in support of "packing" the U.S. Supreme Court and eliminating the Senate filibuster if Majority Leader Mitch McConnell works to confirm a potential nominee to fill the seat left by Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Ginsburg died Friday at 87 after a difficult battle with metastatic pancreatic cancer.

Nine justices have served on the nation's highest court since 1869. Before that, the number of justices changed six times, with the maximum number being 10 during the Civil War.

The filibuster is a threshold of 60 votes that's necessary before a piece of legislation is given an up or down vote.

The extremist Democrats are not going to go quietly into the night. We loyal patriots who are NOT socialists must stand up to them, and quickly! They will legislate our rights away as soon as they get power.

Just look at the words of Marxist Socialist AOC, and see if this doesn't send chills down your spine:

As Republicans show support for moving forward with a Supreme Court nominee quickly, @AOC tells me if that happens, “we should leave all options on the table, including the number of Justices that are on the Supreme Court.” Adds expanding is “absolutely” an option worth weighing.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

Is this what you want? You want AOC and Chuck Schumer messing with our institutions so they can get the Socialist paradise they want?

America can only withstand the extremism of the far-Left if our institutions remain standing.

But the extremist Democrats want to destroy our institutions if they don't get their way- and THAT, we cannot allow to happen.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

I won't let it happen. I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

Americans rightly mourn for the departed Supreme Court Justice. We are a kind and decent people, and that is what we do.

What we do NOT do, is change our institutions because one political party goes nuts with intolerance. And that is what the far-Left wants to do.

If we want to defend our Constitution against the encroachment by the extreme Left, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hQG2xugFSF6OuRU&b=j.VX3Smu7UByiUDWjEQ0PQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053

> Team MJ
>
>
> [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f39/7f51f7bc/45858b1c/4efa6457/3153091690/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-nvrd?refcode=email_20200922.2nd__2166__&amount=10")
