name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: Last call: Submit your questions before next week's presidential debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
It's not too late to submit a question.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3127%2E53494%2EkeCFyZ) Friend, We recently asked the Evergreen community (that includes you!) what questions you want to see the moderators raise at the debates this fall. We were frankly blown away by the influx of responses. More than 500 of you responded with thoughtful, pressing questions about clean energy, fossil fuel subsidies, environmental justice, and more. [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/923?t=3&akid=3127%2E53494%2EkeCFyZ) With just 7 days before the first presidential debate, we need to keep turning up the heat (pun intended). If you haven't submitted a question yet -- or if you've thought of more since we last reached out -- it's not too late to contribute. **[What question would you like to see the moderators ask at this fall's debates?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/923?t=4&akid=3127%2E53494%2EkeCFyZ)** Thanks so much, Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action | [ASK A QUESTION ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/923?t=5&akid=3127%2E53494%2EkeCFyZ)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Pelosi wants to impeach Trump AGAIN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020.**

I was furious that Pelosi wasted the people's time and money on a purely partisan impeachment sham. Her scandalous waste of time and effort left us less prepared for COVID, and impugned a great President who was finally vindicated!
**_Can you believe that Nancy Pelosi, drunk with power and driven mad by the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, is already threatening ANOTHER pointless partisan impeachment sham, to prevent the President from exercising his sworn Constitutional duties!_**
_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi on Sunday would not rule out impeachment as an option to stop President Trump’s U.S. Supreme Court pick from being confirmed to the bench, saying Democrats will “use every arrow in our quiver” to block the eventual nominee._

_Just hours after it was announced that Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg had passed away on Friday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., vowed that a Trump nominee to the Supreme Court to fill her vacancy “will receive a vote on the floor of the United States Senate.”

During an interview on ABC News’ “This Week,” Pelosi, D-Calif., was asked whether she and House Democrats would move to impeach the president, or Attorney General Bill Barr in an effort to prevent the Senate from acting._

_“We have our options. We have arrows in our quiver that I’m not about to discuss right now, but the fact is we have a big challenge in our country,”_
_Pelosi said. “This president has threatened to not even accept the results of the election.”_

_She added: “Our main goal would be to protect the integrity of the election as we protect the people from the coronavirus.”_

_Pelosi was pressed again on whether she would employ impeachment tactics, to which she said the Constitution requires that Congress “use every arrow in our quiver.”_

She is mad! What gives this tinpot dictator the right to disregard the Constitution and threaten actions that could result in a civil war?
It's bad enough that she threatens to flaunt the Constitution and enlarge the Supreme Court to pack it with stark-raving liberals.... _but she also wants to impeach Trump for executing his Constitutionally-prescribed duties???_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)
---

**_Nancy Pelosi and the rest of her extremist team of Democrats must go! _**

_Nancy Pelosi's Deputy Whip is G.K. Butterfield- my far-left opponent. He does not represent us- he's never even represented half the voters in my newly-redrawn swing district!_

I will stop Nancy Pelosi from impeaching the President OR from packing the court! [Can you help me win with the President?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional, and his Supreme Court picks have been superb!

**Pelosi's Democrats are going psycho right now- just frothing at the mouth! I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and taking him out sends a strong message to Pelosi about her abuses of power! **

**Butterfield is an AWFUL campaigner, and I've fought him tooth and nail to this point. I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you!**

[If you want the President to perform his duties and lead our country, I need your help to beat Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! 2020 is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield's record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_xhLr4OL3Nxmng&b=hmvftho5lIX_6Z5lgnDj5g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrJxMLOwM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsrJxMLOwM)

subject: Debate watch party this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/57a5d24278b6/debate-watch-party-this-saturday?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
In just a few days I'll be debating my opponent, and I want to make sure that you get to watch it at our [Facebook live debate watch party!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b7c2688b97&e=140a9b81e7) This debate is a big deal because Adam Kinzinger has dodged debates with every other opponent he has ever had. But because of your support, **Adam knows he is vulnerable and had no other choice but to agree to debate this cycle.**

The debate will begin at 9am CST on the 26th, and you can [sign up here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=51cfcd34cc&e=140a9b81e7) to join our supporters and watch the debate together! Be sure to sign up on the same form to be part of our Weekend of Action to keep our momentum going.

With only 6 weeks left before the election, **we need your help contacting voters now more than ever.** So sign up, watch me take on my opponent in the debate, and join our team of volunteers to help us get our message out!

This campaign season has been different than any other and with you by my side down the stretch, I know we can win this race. I hope you'll join us this Saturday!

Dani Brzozowski

clean_body: | | | | From the desk of the Campaign Manager: Hey Peter, Hope you’re doing well! I just wanted to give you an update on the campaign and how excited we are about our position in the race. With only 14 days until absentee ballots go out, and 42 days until election day, we are in the home stretch now! Communications Update In case you missed it, Mark has unveiled several television ads on broadcast TV! First , Mark highlighted how he will fight for New Mexico values of faith, family and freedom. Mark will always put the people of New Mexico first. Second , Mark highlighted the stark contrast between his vision for New Mexico, and that of Ben Ray Lujan, who has sold-out New Mexico to D.C. time and time again. Third , Mark, and his daughter Ava, shared their story on why healthcare and coverage for pre-existing conditions is so important to them. Ben Ray Lujan has been lying about Mark’s positions and Mark called him out: Social Share Update If you want to show your support for Mark on social media, ! On this page, you can find graphics, images, and text of social media posts to show your support for Mark. | Debate Update Some of you may have noticed our #WhereIsBenRay campaign, calling out Congressman Lujan for ducking debates. Surprise, surprise, he is still ducking. Congressman Lujan has refused to commit to showing up on October 5th on KOB. The Congressman clearly doesn’t want to share his radical, D.C. positions with the people of New Mexico. #RonchettiOnTheRoad Update Mark has been all over the state the last month! From Farmington to Hobbs and Mora to Lordsburg, Mark has been racking up the miles on the campaign trail to talk to as many voters as possible! Check out all of our #RonchettiOnTheRoad videos in this playlist on our | If you want to follow us on social media, you can find us on , , and ! Grassroots Update Our campaign has already begun contacting voters to persuade them to support Mark on election day! We’ve contacted over 70,000 voters statewide, but we need to reach more! If you want to phone from home or safely knock doors, sign up at the link below. One of our County Field Directors will reach out to you! | Thank you all so much for being a part of our campaign team. This is a conservative movement that will take effort from all of us across this beautiful state to turn this seat red. We cannot express how important your support is and what it means to all of us on Team Mark. God bless, Jeff Glassburner Campaign Manager Mark Ronchetti for New Mexico P.S. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

subject: Join me in Support of Mertzlufft for State Senate
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8b4dffea674b/join-me-in-support-of-mertzlufft-for-state-senate?e=9f843ba602)

| Dear Friend,

I hope you will join me **Monday, September 28, @ 6 p.m.** as we rally in support of Josh Mertzlufft, Republican candidate for NY Senate District 60. This event will be located at **3410 Delaware Ave, Kenmore, NY 14217**.

Josh Mertzlufft is the person to do the job, and by sending him to Albany, you're sending an individual who will defend our constitutional rights, push back against Gov. Cuomo and his administration's overreach, and fight for a more affordable New York.

Register here to secure your ticket [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-josh-mertzlufft/sep28](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=24880aebf1&e=9f843ba602)

I hope to see you there.

Robert G. Ortt

Nothing has been more frustrating than seeing my Republican colleagues toss their oath of office aside to protect Donald Trump — a man with no morals, no sense of service, and no human decency.
I started Remedy PAC because I could no longer sit on the sidelines and let my Republican colleagues keep enabling President Trump.
Remedy PAC is the cure for what ails Congress — Republicans who sit on their hands and let our country go to hell so they can keep their jobs, their paychecks, and their health insurance.
Their allegiance to party and president over country is the reason we’ve lost over 180,000 Americans to COVID-19.
Their willingness to let President Trump do and say anything he wants with zero consequences is the reason why tens of millions of Americans have lost their jobs, their paychecks, and their health insurance.
It’s an outrage that some of my Republican colleagues have let it get this bad. That’s why we need to get them the hell out of Congress.
Remedy PAC is launching an aggressive operation to replace Trump lackeys like Lindsey Graham with bold, courageous leaders like Democrat Jaime Harrison.
But I can’t do it alone. That’s why I am calling on you to join me in this fight. Can I count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us take our country back? name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Georgia needs you to be a poll worker.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Be an election hero and sign up today. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d433/1555552583/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hi Friend,

Today is National Voter Registration Day and the 2020 election season is in full swing. What story will you tell your neighbors in Georgia when we look back on this time? [I hope you'll tell the story about how you raised your hand amidst deep uncertainty about the future to make sure every voter's voice is heard and worked the polls. You can start by signing up here.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d430/1555552583/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.powerthepolls.org/fairfight") After you've registered to vote or checked your registration, we want you to take the next step. Poll workers are heroes of our democracy - and we need them now more than ever. Year after year, poll workers make sure that we can keep our polls open during early vote and on Election Day. [Your community needs your help. Sign up to serve as a poll worker this fall.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d430/1555552583/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.powerthepolls.org/fairfight") By serving as a poll worker, you'll help ensure elections run smoothly this fall - and, in many places, you'll get paid for your time. This is the time when those whose names we do not know are counting on us to give everything we've got to ensure free and fair elections. Check your registration status at [vote.org](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d431/1555552583/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://vote.org"), then go to [powerthepolls.org/fairfight](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d43e/1555552583/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://powerthepolls.org/fairfight") to get started serving as a poll worker today. Thank you, Stacey Abrams
Founder, Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d43f/1555552583/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d43c/1555552583/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a6/34a064cc/1a21578d/702d43d/1555552583/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
Last Friday night, just as I, and so many across the country were preparing to celebrate Rosh Hashanah, the Jewish New Year, we learned that Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg had died.
There's a Jewish tradition that those who die on the eve of Rosh Hashanah are especially righteous -- and Justice Ginsburg was a true embodiment of righteousness in her tireless fights for justice. From leading in the fight for gender equality to championing our rights on the Supreme Court, she left an immense legacy.
Now, it's up to us to protect her legacy by fighting our hardest to replace her with a Supreme Court justice who shares her values. I'll be doing everything I can in the Senate, but here's the truth: we need reinforcements.
**[Split a $5 contribution right now to me and the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee to elect a Democratic Senate.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200920-dscc?source=em200920i_4619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
These next few months won't be easy. But Justice Ginsburg fought every day of her life for justice and equality. Now, it's our turn.
[**Will you join me in the fight ahead? Start with a $5 contribution right now to flip the Senate.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200920-dscc?source=em200920i_4619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Let's work to make Justice Ginsburg's memory a blessing,
Jacky

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200920-dscc?source=em200920i_4619&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Here's how you can help protect SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Just when you thought the stakes couldn't get higher. We're not only fighting to bring our country back from this pandemic, and end the era of Mitch McConnell's failed leadership and obstruction -- we are now in the fight of our lives to prevent President Trump from giving another extreme, anti-abortion judge a lifetime appointment on the Supreme Court.
**[With just 42 days until the election, and voting already underway in many states, we have absolutely no time to waste. We need to stand with our Democrat Senate candidates immediately and make sure they have what it takes to get over the finish line. Will you donate $5 to the Democratic Senate Campaign Committee right now?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200919-flip-the-senate?refcode=em200919i_484&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I will be fighting in the Senate with everything I have to make sure Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg's seat isn't filled until there is a new President -- but that alone is not enough. We need to make sure we elect a Democratic Senate to help protect this seat.
Now more than ever, Democrats need to win in November. From reproductive rights and access to affordable health care to protections for LGBTQIA+ community, **everything** is on the line. Which means we need to work day and night through the election to make sure we flip the Senate.
**[Help protect the Supreme Court -- chip in $5 directly to the DSCC right now.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200919-flip-the-senate?refcode=em200919i_484&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for joining the fight,
Patty

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: SUSAN WILD VOTED AGAINST THE POLICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
SUSAN WILD VOTED AGAINST THE POLICE

Last week, SUSAN WILD VOTED AGAINST allowing the House to consider a bill that
would impose harsher criminal penalties on people WHO ASSAULT POLICE OFFICERS.
The Bill, HR 1325, has the support of the Fraternal Order of Police, which Wild
does not support.

What is Susan Wild voting against?

She is voting against standing with our law enforcement officers by blocking
consideration of legislation that would impose criminal penalties on
individuals who assault police officers and prevent individuals from obtaining
life-saving medical treatment by obstructing access to hospitals.

The Bill, HR 1325, has the support of the Fraternal Order of Police, who said
earlier this year about the bill: “Congress should act and act now to address
the terrible violence aimed at our law enforcement officers by passing H.R.
1325, which would impose Federal penalties on individuals who deliberately
target local, State or Federal law enforcement officers with violence in
specific circumstances. This bill sends a strong message of support to the men
and women in the line of fire and to those who would seek to do them harm."

Lisa Scheller, on the other hand, will always have the backs of our law
enforcement, and is honored to have the endorsement of FOP Lodges 35, 75, and
the Pennsylvania State Troopers Association. She promises to defend and protect
the police officers in their efforts to continue to excel in making PA07 a safe
place to live. The law enforcement community has Lisa’s complete and total
support.

Brooke Race

Communications Director

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg's seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
When she drew her last breath in the waning light, she called on each of us who share her passion to breathe life into the causes that inspired her.
But now Mitch McConnell and his Senate Republicans are determined to destroy Justice Ginsburg's legacy.
McConnell is hell bent on reversing the very position he took under President Obama and installing another Trump tool on our highest court for a lifetime.
How much does it infuriate you that McConnell would desecrate the memory of Justice Ginsburg with this cheap political hypocrisy?
**[Add your name now. Tell McConnell you think too highly of Justice Ginsburg to sit silently and watch him make a mockery of selecting a successor to this great woman.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4276/42ab3cf4/678a633a/135d09fe/55418022/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/protect-rbg-s-legacy?source=em200920i_997&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I'm under no illusions this fight will be easy. But if just four Republican Senators commit not to vote for a new Supreme Court Justice until after Inauguration Day, we can ensure the voices of the American people are heard.
Let's do all we can to honor Justice Ginsburg's dying wish not to be replaced before a new president is installed. Let's fight our hardest to hold Republicans accountable for playing by their own rules.
**[Start by adding your name now: tell Mitch McConnell and his fellow Republicans to follow the McConnell rule and wait to confirm a new Supreme Court Justice.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4276/42ab3cf4/678a633a/135d09fe/55418022/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/protect-rbg-s-legacy?source=em200920i_997&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4276/42ab3cf4/678a633a/135d09fe/55418022/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/protect-rbg-s-legacy?source=em200920i_997&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: MUST-WATCH: President Trump addresses United Nations General Assembly on China
body:
This morning, President Trump virtually addressed the 75th session of the United Nations General Assembly... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9ba3ba16c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 22, 2020
---
| | |
# **MUST-WATCH: President Trump addresses United Nations General Assembly on China**

**This morning,** President Trump virtually addressed the 75th session of the United Nations General Assembly, where he explained how America is leading the global fight against an invisible enemy that has claimed countless lives in 188 countries:
| | _In the United States, we launched the most aggressive mobilization since the Second World War. We rapidly produced a record supply of ventilators, creating a surplus that allowed us to share them with friends and partners all around the globe. We pioneered life-saving treatments, reducing our fatality rate 85 percent since April._

_Thanks to our efforts, three vaccines are in the final stage of clinical trials. We are mass-producing them in advance so they can be delivered immediately upon arrival. We will distribute a vaccine, we will defeat the virus, we will end the pandemic, and we will enter a new era of unprecedented prosperity, cooperation, and peace._
|
---|---|---
**The President** told world leaders something else, too. “As we pursue this bright future, we must hold accountable the nation which unleashed this plague onto the world: China.”

**🎬** [**President Trump: We must hold the Chinese government accountable**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=587e50553d&e=3ee4985eea)

**Early this year,** the Chinese Communist Party locked down travel in its own country while allowing flights to leave China and infect the world.

**Then China’s leaders** condemned President Trump’s travel ban _even as they cancelled domestic flights_ and locked Chinese citizens in their homes.

**The World Health Organization** —which is virtually controlled by China—falsely declared that there was no evidence of human-to-human transmission. Later, it falsely said people without symptoms would not spread the disease.

**“The United Nations** must hold China accountable for their actions,” the President said.

**The Coronavirus pandemic** is only the latest global problem involving the Chinese government. Each year, China dumps millions of tons of plastic and trash into the world’s oceans. It overfishes other countries’ waters, destroys vast swaths of coral reef, and emits more toxic mercury into the atmosphere than any country on Earth.

**🎬** [**WATCH: For UN to be effective, it must focus on real problems**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f13e898ba7&e=3ee4985eea)

**China’s carbon emissions** are nearly twice those of the United States. By contrast, after President Trump withdrew America from the one-sided Paris Climate Accord, last year America reduced its carbon emissions by more than any country in the agreement.

**“Those who attack America’s** exceptional environmental record while ignoring China’s rampant pollution are not interested in the environment. They only want to punish America, and I will not stand for it,” President Trump said.

**“If the United Nations** is to be an effective organization, it must focus on the real problems of the world,” he added. That includes terrorism, drug trafficking, religious persecution—and holding China’s government accountable for this horrible pandemic.

**🎬** [**Watch President Trump’s full address to the UN General Assembly**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aea98b6331&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**Read the President’s full speech here.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=803a53f86e&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump talks to members of the press along the South Lawn driveway** | September 21, 2020

clean_body: This morning, President Trump virtually addressed the 75th session of the United Nations General Assembly... | | | | | The White House • September 22, 2020 | | | MUST-WATCH: President Trump addresses United Nations General Assembly on China This morning, President Trump virtually addressed the 75th session of the United Nations General Assembly, where he explained how America is leading the global fight against an invisible enemy that has claimed countless lives in 188 countries: | | In the United States, we launched the most aggressive mobilization since the Second World War. We rapidly produced a record supply of ventilators, creating a surplus that allowed us to share them with friends and partners all around the globe. We pioneered life-saving treatments, reducing our fatality rate 85 percent since April. Thanks to our efforts, three vaccines are in the final stage of clinical trials. We are mass-producing them in advance so they can be delivered immediately upon arrival. We will distribute a vaccine, we will defeat the virus, we will end the pandemic, and we will enter a new era of unprecedented prosperity, cooperation, and peace. | ---|---|--- The President told world leaders something else, too. “As we pursue this bright future, we must hold accountable the nation which unleashed this plague onto the world: China.” 🎬 Early this year, the Chinese Communist Party locked down travel in its own country while allowing flights to leave China and infect the world. Then China’s leaders condemned President Trump’s travel ban even as they cancelled domestic flights and locked Chinese citizens in their homes. The World Health Organization —which is virtually controlled by China—falsely declared that there was no evidence of human-to-human transmission. Later, it falsely said people without symptoms would not spread the disease. “The United Nations must hold China accountable for their actions,” the President said. The Coronavirus pandemic is only the latest global problem involving the Chinese government. Each year, China dumps millions of tons of plastic and trash into the world’s oceans. It overfishes other countries’ waters, destroys vast swaths of coral reef, and emits more toxic mercury into the atmosphere than any country on Earth. 🎬 China’s carbon emissions are nearly twice those of the United States. By contrast, after President Trump withdrew America from the one-sided Paris Climate Accord, last year America reduced its carbon emissions by more than any country in the agreement. “Those who attack America’s exceptional environmental record while ignoring China’s rampant pollution are not interested in the environment. They only want to punish America, and I will not stand for it,” President Trump said. “If the United Nations is to be an effective organization, it must focus on the real problems of the world,” he added. That includes terrorism, drug trafficking, religious persecution—and holding China’s government accountable for this horrible pandemic. 🎬 📖 | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump talks to members of the press along the South Lawn driveway | September 21, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Who are they calling a bigot?
body:
Patriot,

This race could not get more ironic.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394126-928478-5203704-8652e79537-51d8b0556c)
Patriot,

This race could not get more ironic.

Just moments ago, my radical Democrat opponent Lois Frankel sent out a fundraising email from House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer.

Hoyer wrote, "**Lois needs your help in fighting a hate-mongering Republican opponent, Laura Loomer . . . Loomer is feeding off fear and anger to build her coalition of supporters.** "

Hoyer continued saying that my campaign is "**running bigoted attack ads to distract us**."

Hoyer was establishing his own "fear and anger" campaign to protect Lois Frankel, calling me a "bigot", **but let 's take a look at what Steny Hoyer and his Democrats have been up to . . .**

Last Wednesday, Congress voted on a Republican amendment to the Equity and Inclusion Enforcement Act of 2019.

The short amendment included a section on anti-Semitism - making President Trump's 2019 Executive Order on anti-Semitism part of the law that protects Americans from discrimination.

Sounds like a good bill right?

Not to Democrats . . . and not to Frankel's defender, Steny Hoyer.

**Hoyer, advised all Democrats to VOTE NO on the bill that protects Americans against anti-Semitism and bigotry.**

And following the Democrat leader's advice, **162 Democrats opposed the anti-bigotry bill including Ilhan Omar, AOC, and Rashida Tlaib**.

Had enough of the Democrats yet? [**Help me win in November by donating here.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394126-928478-5203704-8652e79537-51d8b0556c)

**Days after leading the charge to PROTECT anti-Semitism, Steny Hoyer has the audacity to call me a bigot?**

I can't make this stuff up.

But that's what Democrats do. They build up fear and anger based on principles they purportedly protect - then behind the scenes, drop those principles like a hot iron in their hands.

[**Help me get to Washington so I can lead by example.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394126-928478-5203704-8652e79537-51d8b0556c)

[**Donate $10 today and help us air the ads they hate so much to 400 voters in the district.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394126-928478-5203704-8652e79537-51d8b0556c)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: Friend, help us keep Jon's new ad on the air!

body:
We can't let the GOP money drown out our message |
---
Friend,

With some Georgians already voting, and a race that's completely deadlocked, it's critical that we get Jon's message out loud and wide. Especially on TV.

**Today, Jon released a new TV ad vowing to fight to lower prescription drug costs.**

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 so we can keep Jon's TV ad on the air?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f0a/5b2c1286/3a7e9c86/25f3f758/2101119169/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_new_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_22_new_ad&amount=10")**

---

Now that Jon Ossoff is Mitch McConnell's No. 1 target, the GOP is spending millions in attack ads to stop Jon!

**_We can't let McConnell's super PAC (_which has spent more against Jon than any other Democratic Senate candidate!!!_) drown out our momentum._**

It's important that Georgia voters know that Jon will work to end pharmaceutical companies' grip on Congress, which has barred Medicare from negotiating prices to make these prescription drugs more affordable.

And they should also know that Jon's opponent, Senator David Perdue, voted against cracking down on price gouging by drug companies and has taken over $100,000 from the pharmaceutical manufacturing industry.

**[It's abundantly clear who's on the side of the people of Georgia. Make sure Georgia voters know it's Jon Ossoff by making a donation to keep our new ad on the air>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f0a/5b2c1286/3a7e9c86/25f3f75b/2101119169/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_new_ad?refcode=em_2020_09_22_new_ad")**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: This fall
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Happy fall! Even as the weather changes, we can still take it outside. Nothing is more quintessentially New England than our fall traditions like apple picking, pumpkin carving, and checking out our beautiful foliage. This year it's going to be more important than ever that we find ways to have fun outdoors so that we can stop the spread of COVID-19.
I made a quick video to talk about some of the ways my family and I like to enjoy the fall outdoors.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m14_0lH6YiVecXneagDX0lk9n4nykS2jNmVsJGp16rTvbAicEzhQazK5sIZs8vVDaOI7fEjyeO_7FqGE1kZ50DIdjm8KfqONow==&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==)
---
| And don't forget: you have more access to outdoor space this fall than ever before through the [Take It Outside](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m9zvyOzxDb2gu1WpMuNo9sO0V9K71et8xkQ1S2w9b-tx67qgPka6nMM6nu60GXQVaRlmgjpB5hSoFmM4xxFNNoraKeZd5EC0fQ==&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==) campaign. You can [reserve space](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m14_0lH6YiVeksgerJ6iqw0EC2w8c-rurEtWAxBi2kD7T1jyFZl-znjtoh6XMJoWt2Y4dePvRCp0FUrX_P4DUvh0Gy_PKdgnx058NIoh3PGjrSTju_AT2Sg=&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==) at one of Rhode Island's beautiful state parks that are taking part in the initiative, or visit your town or city's website to learn about how they're opening up their outdoor spaces for reservation. We're also setting aside $1 million in federal funds for things like heat lamps, tents, and more to make it easier to do business outside this fall. We've already received applications from more than 80 municipalities and community organizations.
This fall, I want us to make a statewide push to Take It Outside -- so show me your favorite way to have fall fun outdoors! Take a picture of you and your family Taking It Outside and share it with me [by email](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov?Subject=Here%27s%20how%20I%20Take%20it%20Outside), on [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m14_0lH6YiVesVq0RlJBOiaDLBybHsc4z7B6tfGiJOP2um8NswdPQImnci7O8IMMF2hZdqJOqF2Axk-2nUrjQI1lO4eKapio1ogaZm0sfeC32I9FIIWDnG8zqg7mNodB6hZyaWifdcD1DZHx0v6tFY-qcuaQCal9haYlguTOCe5Wq1RoBqhGzn-fo6JAMFEpyREe0Fh8X7lodvizjekfEWb1uWevwe-riNkwAEo3QIFM&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==), or on [Instagram](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m14_0lH6YiVemZmvTgtawcLPa5oAbaGVWPDIVPpdsV8Xe4eOUiwS13GMMOmRzfEbxD891kvdpJUBzPVNkj5R6JU=&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==) using the hashtag #TakeItOutsideRI. I'll share a few of my favorites later through this email and on social media!
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4m14_0lH6YiVe2YF8SFHpNadvJmvSi6eWL8j2gfZ3SSn_D1kkuUf7RIbGgyYM4PhI6-SfWKXIApEldqfh9mfa7jrhW03kA2DEZnJUNL5W_h-BsWuRx3MeLbAkFKVeJ26YWVaRxc6JlAUsPDWBj9QsKWbJHYdMZUYMX3w522calx47riRXlZkMZxxNUVGbtdv6C2C2UFX5xObjJTGqNII5WC3UL4v6FFNVATNaEej2_hV9XlxrsuPgHd3d-IuekJZvrGPLh3wA4gi5p98QF6PPTrg=&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00199pt2U6u2js6hiTHZu8LgbB7Gv7-xFozICIUYRedxb1skxyvAFb4mz8mhm4zBkHIdQyHcCTnrj3GyaFs7ARf631wTnfHXNh4je43mkGvVG0igrL87bjAGE1yGCXwVSSgJ_jimFN40cCkfZPiEO4msV3sl3skmjT-Tslt66fSiY44eHheYa_3nOiicEQht0zO9KE4zuwECeQ=&c=Fd5v_-buW-kIhvMRymMfnYT0UB5ZGEiWdDGqhP59Aq9rhls3dirrjw==&ch=dUYUrATcefkvkzGi0wV_XtVUCdd-KsSu6ItC9uGeKaK4C5FfzwW6Cw==)

This fall, I want us to make a statewide push to Take It Outside -- so show me your favorite way to have fall fun outdoors! Take a picture of you and your family Taking It Outside and share it with me mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov?Subject=Here%27s%20how%20I%20Take%20it%20Outside, on ==, or on == using the hashtag #TakeItOutsideRI. I'll share a few of my favorites later through this email and on social media! We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: please do not delete (Black Democrats)
subject: Mitch McConnell WINS (Supreme Court)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by the Congressional Black Caucus PAC
body:
Mitch McConnell is stealing a Supreme Court seat. |
---
**X** DO NOT delete this message
**X** DO NOT check Facebook
**X** DO NOT turn off your computer

Mitch McConnell officially has the votes to confirm Trump's Supreme Court nominee.

We don't have much time left, but there's still time to stop this. [**_Stop what you're doing and RUSH $5 to DEFEAT McConnell and STOP him from confirming Trump's Supreme Court nominee ->_**](https://go.cbcpac.%3D/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_fr_5x-match_defeat-mitch-mcconnell-v2_q32020?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2020.09.22_B4_Defeat-McConnell-4_X__F1_S1_C1__all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000") | | [5X-MATCH $5 NOW ➞](https://go.cbcpac.?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_fr_5x-match_defeat-mitch-mcconnell-v2_q32020?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2020.09.22_B4_Defeat-McConnell-4_X__F1_S1_C1__all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**_FIRST:_** McConnell swore he'd never seat a new Supreme Court Justice in an election year.

**_THEN:_** He went back on his word (_SURPRISE!_) and is HELLBENT on confirming Trump's new pick.

**_SO NOW:_** We're rushing to raise an emergency $20,000 to defeat McConnell and SAVE the Supreme Court from his devastation.

This is SO important that we're 4X-MATCHING every dollar. Do not let him get away with this!!!
[**_Mitch McConnell is a liar and a cheat. Will you rush $5 (4X-MATCHED) to defeat Mitch McConnell and SAVE the Supreme Court? ->_**](https://go.cbcpac.%3D/?g=iRqZOt8pCaBe6wkNseiFmTA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_cbc_fr_5x-match_defeat-mitch-mcconnell-v2_q32020?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2020.09.22_B4_Defeat-McConnell-4_X__F1_S1_C1__all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations?=
subject: Future Generations Is Coming to California for Audrey Denney!
body:
Audrey Denney is ready to send Trump's errand-boy, LaMalfa packing! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=e688b88c6a&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
### **Audrey Denney is a Future Generations Candidate!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3df71e6e26&e=66979298f9)
---
| Audrey Denney is an agent of change — an educator, farmer, and human rights activist, who truly understands the struggles of her community. California’s 1st Congressional District has been devastated by wildfires, increasing poverty, lack of healthcare, and most recently an outrageous ploy by LaMalfa to exploit indigenous tribal rights to enrich his corporate donors. Audrey is the visionary leader we need in Congress to champion a progressive platform for Future Generations. In 2018 Audrey came close to flipping the district, but with the movement behind her, she's ready to finish the job.
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR AUDREY!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=984d47b5e2&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER FOR AUDREY!")
---
|
> _"I am thrilled to accept the endorsement of Future Generations. The organization's focus on advancing social justice issues through the lens of bold climate change action aligns with the pillars of my campaign and the matters I plan to put first when I'm serving in Congress.”
>
> — **Audrey Denney** , Candidate for Congress (CA-01)_
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **We are coming to California **
---
| As a brand new organization, we have shown what we can do when we mobilize the youth and Native people across the nation.

We are proud to have Audrey be our first endorsement in California. Audrey is a no-gimmicks candidate who has the courage to campaign on Medicare for All and Green New Deal, unapologetically because she is running on the issues that matter and impact her community directly.

We have built a nationwide coalition with organizations like Sunrise Movement, Youth Climate Strike, MoveOn, and Flip the West. After Texas, Idaho, Missouri, Alaska, and one of the hottest Senate races in Massachusetts, we've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win! WIN BIG!

We can do the same for Audrey in CA-01, and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in California, Congressional District 4 to unseat Tom McClintock once and for all, and defend TJ Cox's close race in District 21 - but we can only do it with your support. [Will you chip in to help us cover these expenses so we can keep winning?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=51dd3d3932&e=66979298f9)
---
| [GIVE $1](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b3ea17fc41&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $1")
---
| [GIVE $10](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=15bd270dab&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $10")
---
| [GIVE $100](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=65f4ff17e0&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $100")
---
| [GIVE OTHER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f9200f1030&e=66979298f9 "GIVE OTHER")
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR AUDREY!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d889fe0195&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER FOR AUDREY!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we are pushing phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** [Will you support our work in CA?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8a0b295980&e=66979298f9)**
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b063317563&e=66979298f9)
---
| [DONATE TO FUND OUR CALIFORNIA WORK!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b42847caab&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO FUND OUR CALIFORNIA WORK!")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c20cc83af0&e=66979298f9)
---
| When I first met Audrey, well, it was a fan-girl moment. We have a shared passion for activism, a love for El Salvador, and we both ran people-funded campaigns as Justice Democrats against two of the worst Republican Congressmen, LaMalfa and McClintock, representing some of the most precious and scared spaces in California.

There are more than 13 federally-recognized tribes in California's 1st District. Living up to the promises the United States has made to Native people may not be easy, but it is necessary. As a young organization, we have made a promise to support candidates that will honor and defend Tribal Treaty Rights, help improve tribal access to health care, environmental justice, housing, education, and sustainable economic growth. In every state, for every race, Future Generations is dedicated to follow the lead of tribal members and native youth in Indian Country. Our program in Alaska is providing the winning blueprint to mobilize and prove that the Native vote can make the difference.

This 2020 election cycle, we will elect Audrey Denney to Congress. That is my commitment.
---
| Sincerely,

**Roza Calderon**
_Executive Director_
Future Generations
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=0f1b4c9128&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=4ca5b7aeb7&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b95c9abdfd&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=2f94794a84&e=66979298f9)

We have built a nationwide coalition with organizations like Sunrise Movement, Youth Climate Strike, MoveOn, and Flip the West. After Texas, Idaho, Missouri, Alaska, and one of the hottest Senate races in Massachusetts, we've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win! WIN BIG! We can do the same for Audrey in CA-01, and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in California, Congressional District 4 to unseat Tom McClintock once and for all, and defend TJ Cox's close race in District 21 - but we can only do it with your support. | "GIVE $1" | "GIVE $10" | "GIVE $100" | "GIVE OTHER" | "VOLUNTEER FOR AUDREY!" | | | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, we are pushing phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents. | | "DONATE TO FUND OUR CALIFORNIA WORK!" | | | When I first met Audrey, well, it was a fan-girl moment. We have a shared passion for activism, a love for El Salvador, and we both ran people-funded campaigns as Justice Democrats against two of the worst Republican Congressmen, LaMalfa and McClintock, representing some of the most precious and scared spaces in California. There are more than 13 federally-recognized tribes in California's 1st District. Living up to the promises the United States has made to Native people may not be easy, but it is necessary. As a young organization, we have made a promise to support candidates that will honor and defend Tribal Treaty Rights, help improve tribal access to health care, environmental justice, housing, education, and sustainable economic growth. In every state, for every race, Future Generations is dedicated to follow the lead of tribal members and native youth in Indian Country. Our program in Alaska is providing the winning blueprint to mobilize and prove that the Native vote can make the difference. This 2020 election cycle, we will elect Audrey Denney to Congress. That is my commitment. | Sincerely, Roza Calderon Executive Director Future Generations | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Coalition building is my super power
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1dc296b31c81/coalition-building-is-my-super-power?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone —

Today, we officially rolled out our endorsement from Our Revolution. And honestly, we thought long and hard about the best way to get that message out there.

>From the beginning of this campaign, my opponent has been calling me the “AOC of Illinois,” and the last thing I want to do is give him more fuel for his uninspired attacks.

**But I’m proud to have the endorsement of Our Revolution.** It is particularly gratifying to me that they endorse grassroots-style campaigns exactly like this one: campaigns where we are putting stamps on envelopes in my basement and relying on supporters like you to fund our TV ads.

Plus, having Our Revolution by my side as we head into the final weeks of the race is a testament to the kind of coalitions we have built over the course of this campaign. **When we win, it will be because we have been able to bring together folks from all across the political spectrum in this fight for dedicated and compassionate representation in IL16. **

The number of people who believe in this race is growing every day. [Will you make a donation today to demonstrate that you believe in us, too? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a3b1ede0dd&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Dani

It's National Voter Registration Day, and it's a chance for this team to come together around a shared purpose: register as voters while we can, get our message out there to undecided voters, make sure as many supporters get to the polls as possible, and win.

body:
[1]Powered By People

Happy National Voter Registration Day!

On this day every year, non-profits, PACs, and campaigns send out
thousands of emails, checking to make sure that the folks on their list
are registered to vote. This is an important question and we’re glad all
those groups are sending those emails today, so we don’t have to.

Instead, we’re going to ask something more of you: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43078?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1001&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]Will you help
register Texas voters before the October 5th deadline?

RSVP to make these vital calls:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34458?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1002&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43079?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1003&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]Saturday, September 26, 1:00 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43079?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1004&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]Get more info or RSVP »

This is your last chance to register voters with Powered by People, so
don’t skip this opportunity. Powered by People volunteers have already
registered over 90,000 new voters this year, but with your help, we can
register even more before the deadline. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43078?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1005&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]RSVP to make a difference with
us on Saturday!

And, just in case you didn’t get any other National Voter Registration Day
emails, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43040?source=ema20200922-106182&t=1006&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN ]you can register to vote here!

We hope to see you Saturday,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=106182%2E444211%2EqvssAN

Mitch McConnell might not be able to accomplish anything in the Senate -- but he's SUPER successful in raising millions of dollars to save his seat. _That 's the only reason Amy McGrath is having a hard time closing two gaps: polling and fundraising._
We need to turn up the HEAT on McConnell by flooding McGrath's campaign with support today. **By MIDNIGHT we must get 5,000 donations to defeat Mitch -- anything less and we risk never closing the gaps in this race. [Will you chip in to help us hit 5,000 donations before our deadline?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d01c9/72412298/5666b124/61077ff4/114039468/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbWl0Y2hwb2xsX3NlcHQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDkyMl9LZW50dWNreVBvbGxUU1RfVTRfWDYiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_mitchpoll_sept?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200922_KentuckyPollTST_U4_X6&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+us+hit+5000+don&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200922_KentuckyPollTST_U4_X6&source=VPP_EM_FR_200922_KentuckyPollTST_U4_X6")**

body:
**Nick is live online right now, joined by his wife Tina, for his Tuesday Night Town Hall at[NickForVA.com/live](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=dbb483914a584da0be157142047d7dec&_e=Cw_g68hZV_FvYLdKx0s9_hFalO1iBJUBQaiwLs28fU8rAepv3TNMNvZq-qmB7TonVTvNAeAZz47ToEZV0AJI5AOXDr2Zi2NbcePwt-tfNpVkS-VpJnVxt2i8Bv1hi_IrroO3ebs43HNZVw5LCHag7x4--vZEFkmEXwSZCsQrDqefPvkRpXCCnOlPCyhxS9kQOVspbbMW5vkHd7IbQ-TRcu5EApnvuO8UqvtZFj4EIR8Lk1MxZLDNVA0dbKfmr_R-DEaWHHzCpaZXsuslfqeWMQ%3D%3D)!** Starting out tonight's town hall, Nick will be talking about Congresswoman Spanberger's hypocrisy when it comes to campaigning on campaign finance reform while supporting legislation like H.R.1 that gives $5 million in public funds to every federal campaign to fund their campaign.
